name: validate-all: emits a summary {files_total, files_passed, files_failed, files_excluded_from_aggregation}
command:
mkdir -p tree/google tree/owasp && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > tree/google/ok.yaml && printf 'source:
  id: bad
' > tree/owasp/bad.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>out.json && grep -E '"files_total":2.*"files_passed":1.*"files_failed":1' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
